description: Bezier curve is used along with Bezier Tube Mesh to define the array of curve points that control the mesh's shape. See Bezier Tube Mesh for a full example.

fields.Points: A list of controlling Curve Points.
fields.CoordinateSpace: The Coordinate Space in which to do curve calculations in.
fields.AssignCurveData: The list to fill with curve data, which is the ``Points`` field of a Bezier Tube Mesh.
